---
title: "Smart Tables Revealjs"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
filters:
  - quarto
  - ../_extensions/smart-typst-tables/smart-typst-tables.lua
smart-tables:
  profile: compact
  table-width: full
  align: center
  stripe: true
  revealjs:
    max-width: 100%
    max-height: 70vh
    overflow: auto
    font-size: auto
---

## Reveal Table

::: {#tbl-reveal-summary smart-tables-profile="compact" smart-tables-max-header-lines="2"}

| Team | Open tasks | Average cycle time | On-time rate | Follow-up comment |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Platform | 42 | 6.4 days | 91.0% | Stable delivery with a few integration delays. |
| Data | 31 | 5.8 days | 88.5% | Batch validation adds some review time. |
| Design | 18 | 4.1 days | 94.2% | Small queue and fast feedback loops. |

Reveal summary table.
:::

See @tbl-reveal-summary.

## Plain Profile

::: {smart-tables-profile="plain" smart-tables-width="natural" smart-tables-align="left"}
| Item | Value | Comment |
|---|---:|---|
| Average score | 84.2% | Standard presentation for slides. |
| Standard deviation | 7.8 | Minimal decoration. |
| Observations | 126 | Natural width. |
:::

## Long headers remain readable

::: {smart-tables-width="full" smart-tables-header-lines="2"}
| Workstream | Start date | Review date | Planned hours | On-time rate | Follow-up notes |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Discovery | 2026-01-06 | 2026-01-20 | 80 | 91.0% | Stable delivery with a few integration delays. |
| Prototype | 2026-01-21 | 2026-02-18 | 160 | 88.5% | Batch validation adds some review time. |
:::

## Formulae retain their natural width

::: {smart-tables-width="natural"}
| Adjustment | Primes écrites pour année de calendrier 2023 |
|---|---:|
| Calendar adjustment | 1 000 − 1 000 × 6/12 = 500 |
| Exposure adjustment | 500 − 500 × 9/12 + 400 × 9/12 = 425 |
:::
